description: We're building more than just code. We're building a community of data-driven endurance athletes.
headline: Notes from the saddle
label: COMMUNITY
t1_quote: I finally broke the 4 W/kg barrier after years of stagnation. The AI insights identified exactly where I was overtraining.
t2_quote: The adaptive planning saved my season when work got crazy. It automatically adjusted my week so I didn't burn out. It's like having a pro coach in my pocket, but one that actually understands I have a job.
t3_quote: Transparency means I can trust the algorithms. No black boxes, just pure data science applied to my physiology.
